reachability_artifacts: cli-run: SWORN_DIRECT=1 sworn capabilities (binary built from this branch) renders the live registry enumeration — see proof.json reachability.evidence

effort_complexity.rationale: Decided mechanics, breadth of mapping + availability probing + #31 rename spillover + capabilityRegistry retirement.

design_decisions.choice: Registration mechanism: explicit DefaultRegistry(cfg) table (not init() self-registration); resolution: explicit prefix->driver with no smart fallback
options: init() self-registration per driver file (sworn#15 as written)
smart fallback resolution (anthropic/ -> claude-cli when keyless) — rejected
design_decisions.human_decision: Brad, 2026-07-02, planning session (intake.md 'Registration: explicit table' + 'explicit prefix' decisions).
design_decisions.rationale: Deterministic and auditable; config flows in explicitly; the #15 collision concern shrank from 14 provider files to ~4 drivers; silent rerouting rejected per the sworn#69 lesson. Classified Type-2 (reversible, local) — the Type-1 contract decision lives on S01.

design_decisions.choice: D2 prefix breadth: the oai-inprocess identity registers the full chat-capable OAI-compat prefix set (openai-completions/, deepseek/, groq/, mistral/, openrouter/, cloudflare/, github/) plus anthropic/, not only the openai* trio the spec names.
options: full chat-capable set (chosen) — preserves today's loop reach when S06 rewires dispatch through the registry
literal openai trio only — rejected: silently shrinks loop reach at the S06 cutover; verify-only providers stay on the one-shot utility path either way
design_decisions.human_decision: Noted default, Coach-directed recording: Brad (Coach), 2026-07-10, captain-proceed.md disposition 3; Captain verified determinable-correct against live code (review.md pin 3).
design_decisions.rationale: *OAI, *OpenAIResponses and *Anthropic are the only Chat implementers, and model.NewClient maps exactly these prefixes to chat-capable clients today; the unknown-prefix error names what IS registered, so unregistered verify-only providers fail loudly by name.

design_decisions.choice: D3: the sworn#31 prefix rename lands at model.NewClient (the client-construction choke point), accepting utility-path spillover onto gates/bench, rather than registry-side model-ID rewriting.
options: choke-point rename in NewClient (chosen) — one authority for prefix meaning; registry enumeration and in-process dispatch (which re-resolves via NewClient) can never disagree
registry-side ID rewriting before dispatch — rejected: hidden mutation, contradicts the 'explicit prefix, no magic' planning decision
design_decisions.human_decision: Noted default, Coach-directed recording: Brad (Coach), 2026-07-10, captain-proceed.md disposition 3; the #31 rename direction itself was human-decided at planning (Brad, 2026-07-02, intake).
design_decisions.rationale: InProcess.Dispatch re-resolves DispatchInput.ModelID via model.NewClient (inprocess.go:107), so any registry mapping NewClient does not share would make enumeration lie about dispatch; spillover to the one-shot utility path is forced, not chosen (review.md pin 3).
